---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something new for the app, curriculum, or design
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to see?

Describe the feature clearly. What is it, and what does it do?

## Why does this matter?

Who does this help, and how? The more specific you are about the real student, educator, or contributor this benefits — and how — the easier it is to evaluate.

## Which part of LUMIO does this affect?

- [ ] App — Flutter code
- [ ] Curriculum — lesson content or structure
- [ ] Design — UI, illustrations, or animations
- [ ] Developer experience — architecture, tooling, documentation
- [ ] Community — contributor process or infrastructure
- [ ] Something else

## Have you thought about how it might work?

You don't need to have a full solution. But if you've thought about the approach, share it here. Technical details, sketches, examples from other apps — anything that helps communicate the idea.

## Anything else?

Links, references, examples from other products, or anything else that's relevant.
